name: cynetrace-platform
description: Plateforme mobile-first de suivi cynégétique avec Android, API NestJS et backoffice Next.js.

scripts.build:api: npm run build:contracts && npm run build --workspace api
scripts.build:backoffice: npm run build:contracts && npm run build --workspace backoffice
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace backoffice
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:contracts && npm run start:dev --workspace api
scripts.dev:backoffice: npm run build:contracts && npm run dev --workspace backoffice
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace api && npm run lint --workspace backoffice
